name: Treasure Hunt (1D)
description: A tiny game: find the hidden treasure by replying left/right/stay using only the observed distance-to-goal.

binding_vow.description: You are in a 1D world. Each step you receive world_size, steps_left, and distance to the treasure (no direction and no absolute position). Reply with left/right/stay to move. Reward is 1.0 if you land on the treasure before max steps, otherwise 0.0.

reward.description: 1.0 if you find the treasure, else 0.0
